notes: Playable without issues, only crashes when trying to quit the game, but maybe that happens on Windows as well, haven't tested. Version 1.253
title: Edge Of Eternity

notes: Had to force proton 4.2-2 to get a steam controller to work. Game gets choppy here and there, and can be a bit buggy during combat. Overall the game is playable, and the game itself is great.
title: Edge Of Eternity

notes: Crash when quit, but work perfectly.
title: Edge Of Eternity

notes:
The game engine require DXVK implementation of DirectX 11 to work correctly. WineD3D will fail to render correctly, and make the game unplayable.
The last game update enable to close the game correctly without hanging, that once requires to Tab+Shift and force closing the game.
On a Nvidia Optimus laptop requires to build the primus_vk library in order to render Vulkan on NVidia GPU, and play with: 
$ pvkrun %command%
title: Edge Of Eternity

notes: Seems to run well, some graphics glitch but this game is still in alpha version.
title: Edge Of Eternity

notes: Game runs smooth right out of the box. Some lagging while field of view is loading new stuff (fractions of seconds), lagging while menu pops up  (fractions of seconds up to 2 or 3 seconds). Could be because game still is in alpha. No tweaks tested to reduce lag.
title: Edge Of Eternity
